name: Riverbraid
source_reference: primary public documentation required; LinkedIn announcement links recorded in issue #16
allowed_use_boundary: Use only as provisional intake evidence derived from a public announcement.
Do not treat marketing claims or shortened links as canonical technical evidence.

claims: Riverbraid is presented as a stationary fail-closed AI governance layer.
The announcement claims cryptographic verification of configuration, dependencies, and outputs before execution.
The announcement claims Bitcoin anchoring, threshold-signature-controlled changes, independent auditability, and environment-agnostic proxy deployment.
non_claims: No primary technical source verification is claimed.
No EU AI Act or SOC 2 compliance determination is claimed.
No proof of denial reachability, recoverability, or commit-time admissibility is claimed.
No framework-wide validation or compatibility determination is claimed.
